overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath an overpass, then crosses a wet, reflective intersection surrounded by towering digital billboards and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under massive concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, with futuristic traffic visible to the left

entered.detail: massive concrete structure forming the roof of the covered walkway
series of illuminated advertising screens mounted to the overpass ceiling
wet concrete pedestrian walkway with red and yellow markings
multi-lane road with futuristic vehicles passing by
vertical digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a covered urban walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The ceiling is lined with digital billboards, while neon advertisements line the right side. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the left, and the wet pavement reflects the artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from covered walkway to open intersection

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open urban environment
ambient lighting shifts from enclosed artificial to open night sky with neon city glow

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the enclosed walkway opens up to reveal a sprawling neon-lit intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: dark night sky visible beyond the end of the overpass
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows lining the horizon
wide open intersection with multiple lanes and crosswalks becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a transitional zone where the overpass ends and the open city intersection begins. The lighting shifts from artificial enclosure to the ambient glow of neon signs and streetlights. Distant skyscrapers become visible as the camera approaches the wide intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large wet intersection with prominent digital billboards

events.description: begins crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk
futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection on the yellow crosswalk, navigating between moving traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboard displaying fashion advertisement with white background
bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
rain-slicked pavement reflecting neon lights and vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the open intersection, crossing the wide street on yellow-striped crosswalks. A massive vertical JINGUJI billboard dominates the left side. The wet pavement creates dramatic reflections of neon signs and passing futuristic vehicles. The environment is fully exposed to the night sky with dense urban architecture surrounding the intersection.

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing across the intersection

agents.ego_description: completing the street crossing while turning slightly toward the right sidewalk, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking on the approaching sidewalk

entered.detail: destination sidewalk on the far side of the intersection with pedestrians
street-level commercial buildings with illuminated entrances and signage

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the far side of the intersection, with the JINGUJI billboard now prominent on the left. The camera turns slightly right toward the opposing sidewalk where pedestrians are visible. The wet street continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights as the crossing nears completion.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered urban corridor into the expansive, neon-drenched openness of a futuristic city intersection. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving along a covered walkway where digital billboards and neon advertisements reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera emerges from this enclosure, the artificial ceiling gives way to the ambient glow of the night sky and the distant silhouettes of towering skyscrapers. The scene then expands into a wide intersection, crossing yellow-striped pavement dominated by a massive vertical JINGUJI billboard and the dramatic reflections of passing futuristic vehicles. Finally, the camera approaches the far sidewalk, turning slightly toward nearby pedestrians as the crossing concludes amidst the dense urban architecture.
